basic_details.job_title: IIT Goa ANRF-Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa) has published the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 ANRF-Senior Research Fellow position. Candidates holding an M.E./ M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, or allied branches with a valid GATE qualification and two years of research experience are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 20 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are provided below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering or Allied branches, Qualified GATE, 2 years of research experience
qualification.details: ANRF-Senior Research Fellow: M.E./M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering or Allied branches with Qualified GATE and 2 years of research experience

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_goa_iit_g: M.E./M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering or Allied branches, Qualified GATE, 2 years of research experience

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Goa ANRF-Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: ANRF-Senior Research Fellow: M.E./M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering or Allied branches with Qualified GATE and 2 years of research experience

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: ANRF-Senior Research Fellow: Rs. 42000 Per Month

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Goa ANRF-Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa ANRF-Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Goa recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Goa recruitment is ANRF-Senior Research Fellow. This position is part of the latest notification released by the Indian Institute of Technology Goa for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow post at the Indian Institute of Technology Goa. Interested candidates should check the official notification for detailed information.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is "Walk-in". Candidates are required to attend an interview directly at the specified venue and date with their documents.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date for the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date for the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow post is 20 July 2026. Candidates must report on this date with all necessary documents for the interview process.

faq.question: Q5. What are the required qualifications for the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.E./M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering or Allied branches, a qualified GATE score, and 2 years of research experience to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow post will receive a salary of Rs. 42000 Per Month. This is a contractual position at IIT Goa.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIT Goa ANRF-Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIT Goa ANRF-Senior Research Fellow recruitment. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview free of cost.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow post at IIT Goa is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be evaluated based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job location for the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The job location for the ANRF-Senior Research Fellow position is Ponda, Goa, with the pincode 403401. The Indian Institute of Technology Goa campus will be the workplace.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents along with self-attested photocopies of ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, category certificate (if applicable), a duly filled application form (if required), and extra passport-size photographs.

faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Goa recruitment is ANRF-Senior Research Fellow. This position is part of the latest notification released by the Indian Institute of Technology Goa for eligible candidates.
